description:
A drone operations manager needs to create a backup of the Aerobridge aircraft registry before a scheduled system migration. Export all data from the Aerobridge registry app to a pretty-printed JSON fixture file with an indent of 2 spaces. Save the output to /home/ga/Documents/registry_backup.json.

System Information:
- Aerobridge path: /opt/aerobridge
- Virtual environment: /opt/aerobridge_venv
- Environment configuration: /opt/aerobridge/.env
- Django settings: aerobridge.settings

The backup must be a valid Django fixture containing all registry models, including Aircraft, Person, Operator, Manufacturer, FlightPlan, FlightOperation, and FlightLog.
